summary.en-US: Adds Back/Home buttons to the Firefox kiosk mode.

description.en-US:
Adds a compact navigation toolbar — **Back**, **Home** buttons, a **Loading indicator** and a read-only URL bar — to Firefox running in `--kiosk` mode.

Firefox's built-in `--kiosk` flag hides all browser chrome including navigation controls. This extension restores just enough UI for users to navigate, without exposing the full browser.

**Features**

- Back and Home buttons, always visible
- Read-only URL bar showing the current page address
- PDF support — PDFs open inside a wrapper page that keeps the toolbar visible
- Idle timeout — returns to the home page after 5 minutes of inactivity
- New-tab suppression — links targeting new tabs are redirected into the current tab
- Keyboard shortcut blocking (Ctrl+T, Ctrl+N, Ctrl+L, F12, and more)
- Right-click context menu disabled
- No settings — uses the homepage configured in Firefox preferences

Designed to work alongside a Firefox Enterprise Policy file for a complete kiosk lockdown. See the repository README for a recommended `policies.json` template.
